text.title: GCP Terraform Templates Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `GCP Terraform Templates` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: design-modules
step.action: Identify shared modules vs root-local resources; pin module versions.

step.name: configure-backend
step.action: Define `backend "gcs"` block; ensure versioning + lifecycle on the bucket.

step.name: wire-wif-for-ci
step.action: Add WIF pool + provider; bind SA; remove any SA JSON secrets.

step.name: apply-and-tag
step.action: Apply via CI (WIF); tag the repo with module version.
